text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm called to the director's office. I'm
not told why, but only that my presence is
necessary to "help make the URA Finale a
success."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I head inside...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Trainer <username>!
Just as I thought!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Emergency... Both of you, I beg you, help me!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? P-please calm down, Director! First of all,
could you tell us what's going on?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Regret... Even after I made that grand
announcement and asked the media to promote
the URA Finale...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately... The URA Finale is still not widely
known among the general public!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Thusly! We must find some way to communicate
its appeal and generate some excitement!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
We must have a race packed with smiling fans!
That is the stage on which all Umamusume should
shine!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I understand how you feel, Director.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'd be delighted to help you find a solution... but
what could we do?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Excellent question! That is why I have asked you
two exceptional trainers here!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I wish for you to participate in an event aimed at
promoting the URA Finale and the hardworking
Umamusume hoping to take part in it...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: The URA Finale Commemorative Festival!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I-I see... So what will this festival consist of?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's the thing... I was so preoccupied with
setting it up that our event schedule at the
moment is...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Nonexistent!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For starters, we put our heads together and
discuss what type of event we want to hold.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Apologies! I'm causing you so much trouble...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... This was definitely a surprise, but I'm not
about to give up on the event.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Meek has her heart set on becoming the first
Finale Champion.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I can't let her efforts go to waste!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the trainer of another Umamusume who's
working equally hard, I feel much the same.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Gratitude! Thank you, from the bottom of my
heart! I knew you wouldn't let me down!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
To business! What do you think the event should
entail?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... If we're looking to attract attendees,
panels done by the Umamusume and
mini-concerts tend to be the usual go-to's...
choice_data_list: But that's a lot to ask of them...
But that's a lot to ask of them...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
It is. Not to mention, this is when they need to be
focusing on training.
choice_data_list:
Is there anything we can do with just the two of
us?

Is there anything we can do with just the two of
us?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Just us? Surely not...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Eureka! I have an idea!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
We want to convey just how hard our
Umamusume are working to qualify for the URA
Finale, yes?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Then there's something that you two—indeed, only you two—can do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the day of the festival...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Why, Trainer <username>
and Trainer Kiryuin! Good morning!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Rest assured, today's event is going to receive
extensive coverage in Twinkle Monthly.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Although, if you don't mind me asking, where are
your trainees? I was certain they would be here...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid it's just us two today, but not to worry.
You won't be disappointed!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Today, we want to tell you about the racers who
are working hard to earn a spot in the URA
Finale.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
As the trainers who watch them from the
sidelines, we can share a side of the story that
nobody—not even our trainees—can share.
choice_data_list: We'll do our best on their behalf!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Oh? Why, that's...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: That's simply amazing!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
To put your hardworking trainees first, even at
this event... Such devotion!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I see... Umamusume need rest too, so you're
working hard in their place!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Not only are you giving us an enticing,
never-before-seen glimpse at the sweat-stained
efforts of their daily lives...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
But it's clear that you'll do anything for your
trainees! I can't wait to see the fan meetups, talk
shows, and mini-concerts you'll be doing on their
behalf!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Say no more! I will make sure our readers fully
understand how deep your dedication runs!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I know! Why don't I host? When it comes to
warming up a crowd, I'm a professional!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Huh? What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before we know it...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I hope you're watching, everyone! Next up is our
two trainers' mini-concert! ♪

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Umapyoi! Umapyoi!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Ah ha ha! Good luck, trainers!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
They're really putting themselves in their
Umamusumes' shoes... I like their spirit!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text: The URA Finale, huh? Maybe I'll check it out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The event goes a little off-script, but we succeed
in spreading the word about the URA Finale.
